task objective: Implement a race-safe Syncthing status handoff that provides a continuous transition from successful post-game Ludusavi backup status into confirmed Syncthing folder activity.
design decisions: Wrapped statusSurface methods in local closures inside handleAppStart and handleAppExit in gameLifecycleController.tsx. This closes over the lifecycle handler's active epoch, enforcing race-safety/epoch gating while maintaining the exact call syntax expected by static test assertions.
Added syncthing_pending_upload rendering, text (SYNCTHING PREPARING), and cloud upload icon serialization to autoSyncStatusSurface.tsx.
Updated isSyncthingActiveStatus to treat syncthing_pending_upload as active, keeping the status strip visible during Syncthing activity confirmation.
Updated tests/test_frontend_static.py to statically verify syncthing_pending_upload and SYNCTHING PREPARING in the frontend source code.
results: All unit and integration tests (vitest, pytest) pass successfully.
Code linter, formatter, and type checking run clean.
Frontend TypeScript compilation and Rollup bundle build complete successfully.
